div.p: On June 13, Richard F. Allen, Special Assistant to Ambassador Allen, and L. Randolph Higgs, Deputy Director of the Office of Eastern European Affairs, testified before the Foreign Affairs Committee on the situation in Yugoslavia. For the text of their testimony and related questions and answers, see U.S. House of Representatives, Committee on Foreign Relations, Selected Executive Session Hearings of the Committee, 1951–56, volume XV, European Problems (Washington, 1980), pages 73 ff.
